lines.speaker: Soldier
lines.text: Are you here to fight the lizardmen? Be careful - they're fierce!

lines.speaker: Soldier
lines.text: The lizardmen are the bane of Kourend. I'm not much for history, but the Shayzien Army have been fighting them off for as long as anyone can remember.

lines.speaker: Soldier
lines.text: They can be aggressive, and they've got something nasty in their bite that can make you pretty ill.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why are you up here instead of fighting?

lines.speaker: Soldier
lines.text: I got a bite from a lizardman. I'm all cured, but I'm not going down there again until I feel stronger, otherwise I'll be no use in the fight.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you know how many I've killed already?

lines.speaker: Soldier
lines.text: The Shayzien records say you've killed [COUNT] lizardmen since they began tracking your kills. [COUNT] were lizardman shamans.

lines.speaker: Soldier
lines.text: The Shayzien records say you've killed [COUNT] lizardmen since they began tracking your kills. [COUNT] were lizardman shamans.

lines.speaker: Soldier
lines.text: I see no adventurers in the canyon to the east.

lines.speaker: Soldier
lines.text: I see no adventurers in the canyon to the west.
